# Fixture: kylia_mack_payout
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 13.4s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Kylia! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: How do I do my orientation in the app
Concierge: Open the Shiftsmart app, Home tab, find the In-app orientation card and tap Get started → Start learning modules.
Partner: I did that but didn't get $10

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You'll receive the $10 orientation payment right after you submit your background check (step 4 of the In-app orientation). You don't need to wait for the background check to clear — the payment processes as soon as you submit it. You can confirm it landed in the Earnings tab at the bottom of the app.
